title: Fishy's Magic Horses
description: This pack adds multiple horse, mule, donkey and skeleton horse variants that you can access by renaming your steed. (or finding it in the wild *NOT RECOMENDED*)
body:
Got bored of normal horses? You can now have Unicorns, pegusi, and more!

**All mob variants are 100% visual and do not effect gameplay (so no, sadly the pegasus won't fly:(. )**

You can access these by renaming your horses.

RENAMES


Donkeys & Mules:

Skeleton = Anything with the word "skelly" in it.
Pegasus = Anything with the word "pegasus" in it.
Zebra = Anything with the word "zebra" in it. (Also spawns in savanna biomes)

All Horses:

Zombie = Anything with the word "zorse" in it.
Pegasus = Anything with the word "pegasus" in it.
Zombie Pegasus = Anything with the word "zegasus" in it.
Zebra = Anything with the word "zebra" in it.

White Horses:

Unicorn = Anything with the word "unicorn" in it.
Alicorn = Anything with the word "alicorn" in it.
Swift Wind = EXACTLY "Swift Wind" 

Skeleton Horses:

Wing Variants:

Thestral = Anything with the word "thestral" in it
Unicorn = Anything with the word "unicorn" in it.
Pegasus = Anything with the word "pegasus" in it. (Wing texture may vary)
Alicorn = Anything with the word "alicorn" in it. (Wing texture may vary)
